attributes.title: Profile
attributes.researchConsent:
## Informed consent

*This is placeholder text for the demo.* In a real study, the full informed consent form would appear here, describing the study's purpose, what gameplay data is collected, how it is stored and used, and your rights as a participant — including that participation is voluntary and that you may withdraw at any time. Tick the box below and select **Continue** to see the rest of the participant portal.

notConnected.descriptionNotConnected: Link your Steam account so we can collect your owned games and playtime.

connectedSuccess.title: Steam connected
connectedSuccess.description: Your Steam account is linked and active.

connectedFail.title: Steam connected
connectedFail.description: Your Steam profile privacy settings need attention.
connectedFail.feedbackNoOwnedGames: We could not find any owned games.

notConnected.descriptionNotConnected: Link your Discord account to join the study server.

connectedFail.title: Discord
connectedFail.description: There was a problem linking Discord.

deleteAccount.withdrawDescription: You can withdraw your consent at any time.
deleteAccount.deleteDataDescription: Request deletion of all data we hold about you.
deleteAccount.deleteDataModal: Are you sure you want to request deletion of your data?
